title: Customer Contact Schema
description: A schema for retrieval of customer contacts.

collection.description: Array containing all the contacts on a customer.

items.title: customer contact schema
items.description: A schema for information about a customer contact.

customerContactNumber.description: Unique numerical identifier of the customer contact.

email.description: Customer contact e-mail address. This is where copies of sales documents are sent.

eInvoiceId.description: Electronic invoicing Id. This will appear on EAN invoices in the field <cbc:ID>. Note this is not available on UK agreements.

notes.description: Any notes you need to keep on a contact person.

emailNotifications.description: This array specifies what events the contact person should recieve email notifications on. Note that limited plans only have access to invoice notifications.

deleted.description: Flag indicating if the contact person is deleted.

customer.description: The customer this contact belongs to.

customerNumber.description: The customer number is a positive unique numerical identifier with a maximum of 9 digits.

self.description: A unique reference to the customer resource.

sortKey.description: The customer contact number displayed in the e-conomic web interface.

self.description: The unique self reference of the customer contact resource.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: The unique self reference of the customer contact collection resource.
